---
title: "About"

about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/vincentrupp1
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact Me
      href: mailto:vjrupp49@gmail.com
---

Hello! My name is Vincent Rupp, and I am an Augsburg University student studying Data Science, with minors in Mathematics and MIS, graduating in 2026.
